arguments.argument:
bShopOpen=0
cursorPos=1 cursorMax=5
cursorPulse=0 cursorTime=0
bNotInStock=0 bNotEnoughMoney=0
textColor=make_color_rgb(190,160,112)
//---------- Item check ---------- heartCheck=string_char_at(global.heartPiece,27) arrowCheck=string_char_at(global.arrowQuiver,21) energyCheck=string_char_at(global.heartEnergy,26) missileCheck=string_char_at(global.missilePack,12) apCheck=string_char_at(global.apBoost,42)
